task: length() reports one extra character for text. Restore correct empty, ASCII, and multi-byte character counts without changing other value types.
typeof() swaps the labels for text and blob values. Restore the documented names while preserving integer, real, and NULL results.
round(X,Y) treats negative precision as one decimal place instead of zero. Restore the precision clamp without changing positive precision behavior.
unicode(X) returns a value one larger than the first character code point. Restore exact ASCII and multi-byte results while preserving empty and NULL behavior.
